signals.raw: **Iran-US ceasefire (April 7-8):** Trump announced a 2-week pause mediated by Pakistan, tied to Strait of Hormuz reopening; oil slumped below $100/barrel; no fire exchanged since April 8, but Gulf drone attacks persist.[3][6][7]

signals.headline: Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana's Alpenglow upgrade, targeting 100-150ms transaction finality, passed a governance vote with 98.27% in favor, positioning it as a top execution layer despite $80 price hover post-70% peak decline; DEX volume hit $57B in March.[3]

signals.headline: Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors | YES | MED confidence**  
Interactive Brokers launched Solana (SOL) trading for European investors via Zero Hash, expanding access on one of the world's largest brokerage platforms; SOL trades at $82.08 amid strong fundamentals like 167 million users and Symbiosis protocol swaps, though price remains compressed below resistance witho

signals.headline: **Russia-Iran intel sharing:** Ukraine reported on April 7 that Russia provided Iran satellite data on ~50 Israeli energ
signals.raw: **Russia-Iran intel sharing:** Ukraine reported on April 7 that Russia provided Iran satellite data on ~50 Israeli energy sites, aiding potential strikes; pattern linked to 24 surveys of 46 Middle Eastern targets.[1]

signals.headline: BlackRock Staked Ethereum ETF Inflows Reach $155M | YES | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
BlackRock Staked Ethereum ETF Inflows Reach $155M | YES | LOW confidence**  
BlackRock's staked Ethereum ETF pulled in $155M, supporting ETH at ~$2,343 (up from $2,196 on April 13), amid layer-2 competition and price range predictions of $1,800-$2,400.[1][6]
